projects.name: open-ontologies
projects.description: AI-native ontology engine: a Rust MCP server with tools for building, validating, querying, and reasoning over RDF/OWL ontologies. In-memory Oxigraph triple store, native OWL2-DL tableaux reasoner, SHACL validation, SPARQL, versioning. Single binary, no JVM.
